title: ollama/ollama

summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

summary: Official Python client library for Ollama.

summary: Simple TUI to browse, pull, and inspect model manifests from the Ollama registry.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI).

title: otobrglez/ollama-export
summary: CLI tool to export GGUF files from Ollama’s internal cache for sharing or backup.

title: sammcj/ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams responses from a local Ollama instance.

title: richawo/ollama-cli-assistant
summary: Lightweight CLI wrapper that turns Ollama into an always-available terminal assistant.

title: npm: ollama
summary: Official JavaScript client downloaded 200k+ times/month; zero dependencies.

title: PyPI: ollama
summary: Official Python client; supports sync, asyncio, and streaming embeddings.

title: embedchain/embedchain (OllamaEmbedder)
summary: RAG framework that uses Ollama for both local embeddings and chat generation.

title: r2d2rigo/ollama-winui3
summary: Native Windows 11 UI (WinUI 3) frontend for chatting with Ollama models.

title: mneedham/ollama-sdm
summary: Neo4j plugin that streams Ollama responses into graph visualization dashboards.

title: ollama-r/ollamar
summary: Unofficial R client for Ollama; install via devtools::install_github().

title: kevb10/ollama-flutter
summary: Flutter plugin exposing Ollama REST endpoints for mobile/desktop apps.

summary: Community-curated list of 50+ tools, UIs, and integrations built on Ollama.

summary: Discussion around an emerging community hub for sharing Ollama model mods and adapters.
